# D3keyHelperForLinux v1.0.3

This release improves profile management and cleans up README presentation.

## Highlights

- Added dynamic profile management from the GUI.
- Added profile creation and deletion workflows.
- Changed new profiles to use random profile IDs to avoid name collisions.
- Removed the fixed 20-profile limit so users can create as many profiles as needed.
- Fixed profile deletion lookup issues.
- Added multi-select batch deletion for profiles.
- Removed settings illustrations from README files.
- Added the D3keyHelper project link to the README files.

## Notes

- The GUI still prevents deleting every profile; at least one profile must remain.
- Existing profile sections remain compatible.
- New profile IDs are generated automatically.

## 中文摘要

- 新增 GUI 内动态添加/删除配置。
- 新配置改用随机 ID，避免命名冲突。
- 移除最多 20 个配置的限制。
- 修复配置删除查找问题。
- 支持多选批量删除配置。
- 清理 README 中的设置插图，并补充 D3keyHelper 项目链接。
